Package index

Start here

Current parser entry points and planned fitting controls.

hs_data()
Create an hsquared data container
data_status()
Inspect hsquared data-container status
hsquared()
Fit a quantitative-genetic model
hs_control()
Create hsquared control options
backend_info()
Inspect planned compute backends
formula_status()
Inspect formula grammar status
validation_status()
Inspect validation evidence status
model_spec()
Inspect a parsed hsquared model specification
animal()
Animal-model formula marker
genomic() single_step() markers() marker_scan() qtl_scan()
Genomic and QTL formula markers
permanent() common_env() maternal_genetic() maternal_env() paternal_genetic() paternal_env() cytoplasmic() imprinting() dominance() epistasis() relmat() precision()
Quantitative-genetic formula markers

Extractor contract

Extractors for fitted hsquared_fit objects. The default hsquared() call fits the v0.1 Gaussian animal model; repeatability, two-effect, genomic, SNP-BLUP, and multivariate outputs come from opt-in experimental targets.

variance_components()
Extract variance components
heritability()
Extract heritability estimates
genetic_covariance() G_matrix() residual_covariance() R_matrix() genetic_correlation() residual_correlation()
Extract multivariate covariance and correlation matrices
loadings() specific_variance() latent_breeding_values() eigen_G()
Reserved factor-analytic and G-matrix extractors
breeding_values() EBV() BLUP()
Extract breeding values
repeatability()
Extract repeatability estimates
permanent_effects()
Extract permanent-environment effects
common_env_effects()
Extract common-environment effects
maternal_effects()
Extract maternal genetic effects
prediction_error_variance()
Extract prediction error variances
reliability() accuracy()
Extract reliability and accuracy estimates
fit_diagnostics()
Inspect fitted-model diagnostics
confint(<hsquared_fit>) vcov(<hsquared_fit>) profile(<hsquared_fit>) anova(<hsquared_fit>)
Block unsupported likelihood-inference helpers
marker_effects() marker_variance_explained() qtl_table() gwas_table() eqtl_table() lod_scores()
Extract planned marker, QTL, GWAS, and eQTL results
fixef()
Extract fixed effects
ranef()
Extract random effects

Package

hsquared-package
hsquared: R Interface for Julia-Backed Quantitative-Genetic Models

On this page

Developed by Shinichi Nakagawa.
